title: End Progression Modification
description: Encourages exploration of the end by changing the enderdragon fight
body:
This mod seeks to rework the way you fight the end, encouraging exploration on the end before defeating the ender dragon, this mod pairs well with any other end expansion mod.

 Also check this mod out on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/end-progression-modification)

**Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**



# Features 
 

Most minecraft multiplayer worlds end or lose a bunch of players right after beating the dragon, this mod seeks to remedy that:

 

- Initially upon first contact, the enderdragon will now have a shield, making it immune to any kind of damage,

 

In order to actually deal with the ender dragon, one must craft the Ender blade, this being the only weapon capable of destroying the ender dragon's shield. The blade can be crafted by obtaining and crafting together its blade, hilt and pommel. As to adquire the separate pieces, they can be located within the end itself, inside "End altars".

The blade in the altar has been buried in the altar for eons and is no longer usable, one may destroy the altar to adquire one of its pieces at random. 

In order to ease the travel to the outer end islands now that the dragon cannot be defeated, this mod also allows end gateways to be crafted and placed in the world in order to travel across the dimension.



# Dependancies

 

- Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

 

 

# Disclamers / Special Thanks / Credits

 
Special thanks for the team over at [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/) for making this mod possible

 

 

# TO-DO

 

- Add a miniboss to spawn on the altar.

 

If you want to support me, you may donate to my [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magythemage) page, any kind of support is welcome but not necesary.
